campaigns.name: InfiniBand NDR400: Powering Next-Gen HPC Clusters
campaigns.targetAudience: University HPC centres, research computing labs, and AI research institutions building or expanding GPU clusters
campaigns.headline: Unlock 400Gb/s Fabric Performance for Your AI & HPC Workloads
campaigns.keyMessage: The Mellanox InfiniBand NDR400 Switch delivers ultra-low latency and 400Gb/s throughput â the backbone of modern multi-node GPU training clusters. Eliminate interconnect bottlenecks and scale your LLM training, CFD, and genomics workloads with confidence.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Limited stock available for Q3 deployment timelines â secure units before EOFY procurement cycles close
campaigns.estimatedImpact: 5-12 qualified enquiries from HPC/research segment; 1-2 cluster-scale opportunities (A$50k+ basket potential per deal)
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Launch within 7 days; sustain 3-week nurture cadence aligned with university capex planning (June-July AU FY close)
campaigns.reasoning: With zero product views and no traffic signals, the NDR400 needs awareness-building rather than discounting. Interconnect switches are rarely browsed organically â buyers reach them via solution conversations. A featured-product campaign positioning it as a cluster enabler is more effective than a price promo at A$6,350 (already near margin floor given A$500 min margin constraint).

campaigns.name: Build Your AI Cluster: Architecture Briefing Series
campaigns.targetAudience: CTOs, Heads of Research Computing, and Infrastructure Architects at Go8 universities, CSIRO-adjacent labs, and AI-first enterprises
campaigns.headline: From Single GPU to Multi-Node: Architecting AI Infrastructure That Scales
campaigns.keyMessage: Tensor Works' solutions team walks you through reference architectures for AI training clusters â covering compute, interconnect (InfiniBand NDR), storage, and cooling. Vendor-neutral guidance, Australian support, enterprise SLAs.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Q3 FY26 capex windows closing â lead times on interconnect fabric currently 8-12 weeks
campaigns.estimatedImpact: Top-of-funnel: 20-40 briefing requests over 6 weeks; pipeline seeding for H2 FY26
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Begin immediately; the site currently has near-zero traffic (4 sessions/day) so demand-generation is the priority over conversion optimisation
campaigns.reasoning: Analytics show critically low traffic (4 sessions on the sample day, no product views). Conversion-focused campaigns will underperform until top-of-funnel is rebuilt. An awareness campaign establishes Tensor Works as a trusted advisor and creates the contextual demand needed to sell high-ASP infrastructure like the NDR400.

campaigns.name: Research Institution Procurement Program
campaigns.targetAudience: Procurement and grant-funded PIs at Australian universities and medical research institutes (WEHI, Garvan, QIMR, etc.)
campaigns.headline: Grant-Funded AI Infrastructure? We Speak Your Procurement Language
campaigns.keyMessage: Tensor Works supports ARC/NHMRC grant-aligned quoting, multi-year warranty bundling, and compliance documentation for research procurement. From single workstations to full cluster fabrics like NDR400 InfiniBand.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Align quotes with mid-year grant disbursement cycles
campaigns.estimatedImpact: Build qualified research-sector email list (target 150+ opt-ins); 3-5 quote requests in first cycle
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Email send week commencing 25 May; follow-up sequence over 4 weeks
campaigns.reasoning: Research institutions have predictable, grant-driven buying cycles distinct from enterprise. A targeted email program nurtures this segment specifically and surfaces interconnect needs naturally. With no historical view data, this builds the first-party data foundation needed for future campaign personalisation.

campaigns.name: InfiniBand NDR400: Unlock HPC Cluster Performance
campaigns.targetAudience: Research institutions and universities running HPC clusters, AI training labs, and computational science departments
campaigns.headline: Scale Your AI Cluster with 400Gb/s InfiniBand Fabric
campaigns.keyMessage: The Mellanox InfiniBand NDR400 Switch delivers ultra-low latency and 400Gb/s per port, the backbone for multi-node GPU training and HPC simulation workloads. Eliminate network bottlenecks that throttle your A100/H100 clusters.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Limited stock available for Q3 deployment timelines
campaigns.estimatedImpact: Generate 8-15 qualified enterprise leads; potential A$25K-50K pipeline contribution
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Launch immediately, 3-week run with mid-campaign technical webinar
campaigns.reasoning: Product has zero views indicating awareness gap rather than demand gap. NDR400 is critical infrastructure for any serious GPU cluster buyer - needs education-led positioning rather than discounting.

campaigns.name: AI Research Infrastructure Awareness Series
campaigns.targetAudience: University procurement officers, research computing directors, ARC/NHMRC grant-funded labs
campaigns.headline: Australia's Trusted Partner for AI Research Infrastructure
campaigns.keyMessage: From single-node workstations to multi-rack training clusters, Tensor Works supplies the GPU, networking, and storage stack powering Australian research. Local support, grant-friendly procurement, and architecture guidance included.
campaigns.callToAction: Download our HPC Cluster Reference Architecture guide
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Align with FY26 capex planning cycles
campaigns.estimatedImpact: Build top-of-funnel awareness; 50-100 newsletter signups; foundation for Q3/Q4 conversions
campaigns.suggestedTiming: 4-week LinkedIn + email nurture starting this week
campaigns.reasoning: With only 4 sessions/day and empty analytics, the primary problem is traffic and brand awareness, not conversion optimization. Content-led demand generation is the highest-leverage move before tactical promotions can work.

campaigns.name: Enterprise AI Cluster Bundle Outreach
campaigns.targetAudience: Enterprise IT directors and ML platform leads at financial services, telco, and energy companies
campaigns.headline: Build Your AI Training Cluster - End-to-End from One Australian Partner
campaigns.keyMessage: Stop sourcing GPUs, switches, and cabling from disparate vendors. Tensor Works delivers integrated cluster bundles: compute + InfiniBand fabric + deployment support, with single-PO procurement and local SLAs.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Q3 deployment slots filling - secure capacity now
campaigns.estimatedImpact: 5-10 enterprise discovery calls; potential A$100K+ bundle deals
campaigns.suggestedTiming: ABM email sequence over 2 weeks, follow-up in week 3
campaigns.reasoning: Bundling the NDR400 with compute SKUs increases deal size and surfaces the slow-moving switch as part of a solution rather than a standalone purchase. Targets the buyers most likely to need 400Gb fabric.

priorityOrder: InfiniBand NDR400: Unlock HPC Cluster Performance
marketInsight: Analytics signal is extremely thin (4 sessions/day, no product views, no competitor data). This indicates a top-of-funnel traffic and awareness problem rather than a conversion or pricing problem. Tactical promotions will underperform until baseline audience is built - prioritize content-led awareness, technical SEO, and ABM outreach to research/enterprise buyers. The NDR400 is a high-ticket infrastructure SKU (A$6,350) that requires consultative selling, not discounting; position it within cluster solutions rather than as a standalone clearance item. Recommend instrumenting analytics more deeply (referrer sources, search terms, account-level identification) before next campaign cycle to enable data-driven targeting.
